rows.label: tlk70000060_02_msg0001
rows.name:
When I first met Kaede-chan,
I thought that, as a Driver,
something would surely change.

rows.label: tlk70000060_02_msg0002
rows.name:
But nothing changed.
Everything's still the same
as ever!

rows.label: tlk70000060_02_msg0003
rows.name:
I'm still the same old hopeless
crybaby who can't cope under
pressure, at least...

rows.label: tlk70000060_02_msg0004
rows.name:
But you can't just wish for something
to get better, can you? You have
to make it happen yourself.

rows.label: tlk70000060_02_msg0005
rows.name: That really sank in for me...
